title: Memorable quotes where to find
wikitext:
[]: Memorable quotes where to find?             Quote Post by tinmeigut » Tue Jul 18, 2006 7:34 am Where can I find some memorable quotes from Eva? Some of them are very good I want to have a collection of them. Can someone help?

[]:             Quote Post by drinian » Tue Jul 18, 2006 8:29 am [url]http://imdb.com/title/tt0112159/quotes[/url] Mostly of the comedy variety. [url]http://plaza.harmonix.ne.jp/~onizuka/literal/evangelion.html[/url] Literal translation of the complete scripts.

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Tue Jul 18, 2006 8:36 am drinian wrote: [url]http://imdb.com/title/tt0112159/quotes[/url] Mostly of the comedy variety. [url]http://plaza.harmonix.ne.jp/~onizuka/literal/evangelion.html[/url] Literal translation of the complete scripts.

[]: Script compendium, yet again             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Tue Jul 18, 2006 1:33 pm from http://evageeks.org/forum/viewtopic.php?p=33644#33644 Mr. Tines wrote: Scripts 1-26: http://plaza.harmonix.ne.jp/~onizuka/literal/evangelion.html 21'-24': http://www.reiliberationparade.com.ar/textos/scripts/dc/index.htm 25': http://www.evaotaku.com/html/AIR.html 26': http://www.evaotaku.com/html/Sincerely.html "27": http://eva.netroof.net/Base/Med-Radio.htm
